text:
Olivia loved adventure. Each spring, she would pack her backpack and set off into the countryside. One year she climbed a mountain. Another year she sailed a boat along a river. And then one peculiar evening she found an ancient oak tree.

There lay a peculiar tortoise. Its shell was old pewter, and eyes glazed over. Olivia spoke. "You wouldn't happen to know someone magical?"

The tortoise spoke slowly. "Oh yes. You?"

"I believe I could heal you."

The tortoise nodded. "I've been sick forever."

Olivia fed it dried berries. Weeks passed.

One day a bird screeched.

The tortoise moved. Olivia fed it.

Some months later...

"Oh my stars!" exclaimed Olivia.

The tortoise blinked. "I feel much... better."

Olivia pet it. They walked together. When winter came...

"You've saved my life."

"Anything for a good little friend," said Olivia warmly.

Years rolled on... now an old
